summary: Implemented InstancedBricks.tsx for FR-PERF-001 (Instanced Mesh Rendering). Replaced the stub with a full Three.js InstancedMesh renderer. One InstancedMesh per brick type (4 types = ≤4 draw calls). Pre-allocates 1000 instances per type (NFR-SCALE-001). Per-instance color via setColorAt avoids WebGL errors. Geometry disposed on unmount. PR #53 opened on branch feature/15-instanced-mesh-rendering.

artifacts.name: InstancedBricks.tsx
artifacts.description: Full InstancedMesh renderer for FR-PERF-001: one InstancedMesh per brick type, per-instance color via setColorAt, matrix updates on brick changes, geometry disposal on unmount

artifacts.name: PR #53
artifacts.description: Implementation PR for FR-PERF-001 on branch feature/15-instanced-mesh-rendering

human_review_required.reason: Performance tests (T-FE-PERF-001-02, T-PERF-PERF-001-01) require real browser execution to validate FPS targets; human approval needed before merge

recommended_actions: Review PR #53 for InstancedBricks.tsx implementation correctness.
Verify instanceColor buffer is properly set via setColorAt (no WebGL errors).
Confirm matrix updates cover both position and rotation.
Check geometry disposal useEffect is present.
Validate that tests in PR #52 (feature/15-instanced-mesh-rendering-tests) align with this implementation.
Ensure CI runs all tests and passes, especially performance thresholds.
